_comment: Species: Brilliant Void Beast (玄虚) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Brilliant Void Beast

canonical.appearance: Void-aspected beast 5 m, body shifts between physical and void-form, eyes are void-tunnels
canonical.behavior: Hunts by stepping through void; cultivates by absorbing void-essence
canonical.habitat: Void edges, void-aspected forbidden zones, reality faults
canonical.relationships: Wang Lin's bonded companion (N159); kin of void_beast
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: brilliant_void_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
